matahari 0.1.4

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

matahari 0.1.4

  • Fixed broken tests on CRAN.

matahari 0.1.3

CRAN release: 2020-02-06

  • Fixed an error (#20) where dance could not be restarted after it was stopped, thank you (@LucyMcGowan).

matahari 0.1.2

CRAN release: 2019-12-10

  • Expand examples for exported functions

matahari 0.1.1

CRAN release: 2019-10-09

  • dance_recital() now handles R files that do not exist
  • Testing has been greatly expanded

matahari 0.1.0

CRAN release: 2019-05-17

  • Initial CRAN submission

On this page

Developed by Sean Kross, Lucy D’Agostino McGowan.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
